signal_evidence.credit_quality_trend: Our credit trends continue to improve after seeing delinquencies peak in the first quarter of '24... the annualized charge-off rate declined to 3.37% versus 3.52% in the prior quarter... the gap between the newer cohort curve and the 2017 cohort curve widened by 15 basis points, demonstrating continued improvement.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: In 2025, we're just tilting the balance back... that allows us to ensure we're investing today to drive durable growth beyond today into the future in revenue, in products and in members... [Credit Card] will continue to be losing significant amounts of money in the tens of millions of dollar range.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Financial Services revenue per product increased from $59 in the fourth quarter of '23 to $81 in the fourth quarter of '24... we are still under monetized in Invest, so there's opportunity.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We entered 2025 with the best business environment we've had in my time at SoFi... we couldn't be more confident in the long-term outlook for the company.
